shared_properties: The tileset establishes the core palette, art deco geometry, and hard-edge lighting language used by all other assets.
All modules are authored for transparent-background or masked composition inside a fixed 16:9 orthographic scene.
The grid and trim proportions align to the same spatial contract used by ladders, scales, mirrors, and the player hitbox.
differences: This asset focuses on modular architectural coverage rather than single interactive props.
Gold trim is concentrated on traversable and important collision edges while background panels remain muted.
The atlas includes both collision-bearing pieces and non-collision decoration to support multiple floor layouts.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the shadow survival loop, mirror and prism puzzle rules, scale targets, HUD placements, and Bevy runtime constraints for Umbra Scale.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the twilight art deco tower mood, silhouette contrast, gold trims, and hard-edge lighting style.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load twilight_tower_tileset.png during Loading and slice it into one atlas that covers walls, platforms, decorative trims, and ladder-compatible attachment surfaces on a 16 px modular grid.
runtime_notes: Author every tile on a 16 px cadence so Bevy tile placement, ladder snapping, and scale alignment can all share one grid.
Reserve highest contrast for silhouettes and puzzle props; background ornament should never outshine the beam or player.
Support parallax by separating background-only decorative tiles from collision-bearing wall and platform tiles in the atlas metadata.

context.usage: Provides tower walls, ledges, arched windows, columns, and ladder mount surfaces for every puzzle floor.

readability_notes: Playable ledges use the brightest gold trim in the tileset so safe footing reads before background ornament.
Background wall panels stay lower contrast than the player silhouette and light beam.
Window openings and void gaps preserve enough negative space for shadow masks to remain readable.

acceptance_criteria: Canvas is exactly 1024x512 px and all modules align to a 16 px grid without fractional borders.
Traversable platform edges remain readable at 50% preview scale over the twilight backdrop.
No decorative tile uses a brighter highlight than the authored light emitter core.
